reasons: Cecilion has a direct special-skill interaction with Carmilla through Moonlit Waltz, giving him protection while enabling Carmilla to enter from his position.
Carmilla's linked teamfight setup gives Cecilion a stronger window to punish grouped enemies with ranged magic damage.

proof.summary: Cecilion can use Moonlit Waltz with nearby Carmilla, while Carmilla's teamfight link creates a grouped damage window for Cecilion's ranged magic follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Cecilion saves Moonlit Waltz for Carmilla's engage or survival window.
Carmilla enters when Cecilion is positioned safely enough to keep casting.
failureCases: Cecilion is caught before Carmilla can enter.
Carmilla dives when Cecilion has no range, mana, or cooldowns to follow.
The enemy separates before Carmilla's link creates value.

reasons: Atlas can group enemies with Fatal Links, giving Cecilion a clear long-range damage window.
Atlas creates frontline space that helps Cecilion cast from safe distance instead of being forced into the center of the fight.

proof.summary: Atlas starts the teamfight by pulling enemies together, while Cecilion follows from range with magic damage during the grouped-control window.
worksBestWhen: Atlas engages after Cecilion is close enough to follow up.
Cecilion keeps a safe backline angle instead of standing beside the tank.
failureCases: Atlas engages outside Cecilion's casting range.
The enemy cancels or dodges the Fatal Links setup.
Cecilion is zoned before Atlas commits.

reasons: Tigreal can create a grouped engage that makes Cecilion's delayed area damage easier to land.
Tigreal's frontline presence gives Cecilion more time to stack and cast safely behind the fight.

proof.summary: Tigreal groups or locks enemies first, then Cecilion follows with ranged magic damage while the enemy formation is disrupted.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal waits until Cecilion is in follow-up range.
Cecilion keeps a safe backline angle during the engage.
failureCases: Cecilion misses the fixed-distance damage zone.
The enemy uses cleanse, immunity, or displacement to break the setup.

reasons: Lolita helps protect Cecilion's casting position so he can keep scaling and dealing ranged damage.
Lolita's frontline and peel tools reduce the pressure that normally forces Cecilion out of safe spacing.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Cecilion's casting position, giving him more time to scale and punish enemies from behind the frontline.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Cecilion and enemy poke or dive threats.
Cecilion stays inside the protection zone instead of overextending.
failureCases: The enemy dives from multiple angles.
Lolita's key protection skill is forced early.
Cecilion is isolated away from the frontline.

reasons: Mathilda helps Cecilion reposition, which supports his need to preserve distance while casting.
Mathilda's shield and movement support help Cecilion survive dive pressure long enough to keep dealing damage.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Cecilion a safer repositioning option and shielding support, helping him preserve distance during skirmishes.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for enemy dive or rotation windows.
Cecilion uses the mobility option defensively instead of walking forward.
failureCases: Cecilion is burst before he can use the movement option.
Mathilda is too far away to support the escape.
The enemy chains CC after Cecilion repositions.
